debug_info.goal:
x T : ℝ
hx : x > exp 50
hT : T ∈ Set.Ioo (3 * log x) (√x / 3)
⊢ Eψ x ≤ (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖) + FKS.ε₁ x T

failed_attempts:
have hT' : T ∈ Set.Ioo 50 x := by
    constructor
    · linarith [Real.exp_pos 50, hx]
    · nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg x, Real.sq_sqrt (le_of_lt (show 0 < x from by linarith [Real.exp_pos 50, hx]))]
  exact theorem_3_1 hx (by use 2 * x; constructor <;> norm_num) hT'
